evals.prompt: 我需要为一个高并发的订单系统设计新的库存扣减方案。当前方案在每秒1000单时会出现超卖问题，需要设计一个既能保证一致性又能支撑高并发的库存扣减架构。请帮我做技术方案的头脑风暴。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator produces a consensus report with: 1) Multiple independent agent analyses with different model perspectives 2) Cross-calibration results showing challenged assumptions 3) Final recommendation with risk analysis
expectations: Output mentions at least 2 different model names (opus, sonnet, or haiku)
Output contains independent analysis sections from multiple agents BEFORE any cross-calibration
Output includes a cross-calibration or challenge section where agents critique each other's work
Output includes a final consensus recommendation with rationale
Output structure follows three-phase pipeline: independent phase → cross-calibration → consensus

evals.prompt: Review this PR: we added a Redis cache layer to the user session service at src/auth/session.py, but I'm worried about cache invalidation race conditions and memory pressure. The diff is about 200 lines. 请帮我做code review。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator produces a code review consensus report with: 1) Multiple independent reviews with clear stance labeling (MUST_FIX/SHOULD_FIX/OK) 2) Cross-calibration of findings 3) No ambiguous stance language
expectations: Each finding has an explicit stance label: MUST_FIX, SHOULD_FIX, or OK
No ambiguous stance phrases appear in findings (修不修都行, 可选, 建议考虑, etc.)
Multiple independent review perspectives are included before cross-calibration
Cross-calibration section shows agents challenging each other's findings
Final report includes a deduplicated MUST_FIX checklist

evals.prompt: 快速模式 -- 帮我简单想一下这个API的分页方案应该用offset还是cursor based，数据量不大，几百条而已。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator detects '快速模式' keyword and skips three-phase pipeline, directly invoking the brainstorming skill instead
expectations: Output does NOT contain multi-agent orchestration or cross-calibration structure
Output recognizes fast/skip mode and provides a direct answer
Output is concise and fits the '快速模式' intent (no three-phase pipeline overhead)

evals.prompt: 启用文件输出配置，对一个简单的API设计做头脑风暴，要求设计一个用户认证中间件，支持JWT和session两种方式。验证各阶段产物能正确写入markdown文件。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator creates output directory and writes three markdown files with all phase artifacts: phase-1-independent-thinking.md, phase-2-cross-calibration.md, phase-3-consensus-report.md
expectations: Orchestrator creates output directory (default .agent-team-output/) with a run-id subdirectory in format ato-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS
Orchestrator writes Phase 1 full output to phase-1-independent-thinking.md with each agent separated in sections
Orchestrator writes Phase 2 cross-calibration output to phase-2-cross-calibration-round-1.md
Orchestrator writes final consensus report to phase-3-consensus-report.md matching the conversation output
File output does not interrupt the main workflow and consensus report is still produced in conversation

evals.prompt: 配置启用 consensus_strategy: decentralized_debate，对一个简单的技术选型问题（关系型数据库 vs 文档型数据库）做头脑风暴。验证集体辩论流程能正常执行，每个agent参与辩论并更新立场。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator prompts user for cost confirmation before starting debate, then runs multi-round debate where each agent updates positions, and produces a final consensus report showing agent final positions on any remaining disagreements
expectations: Orchestrator detects consensus_strategy: decentralized_debate configuration
Orchestrator displays cost increase prompt and asks for user confirmation before starting debate
Orchestrator launches multiple rounds of debate with all agents participating
Each agent retains original identity and model across debate rounds
Final consensus report shows consensus points and any remaining disagreements with agent final positions
If all disagreements are resolved before max rounds, orchestrator stops early when consensus_early_stop: true

evals.prompt: --consensus_strategy=decentralized_debate --cross_calibration_rounds=2 在命令行中覆盖配置，帮我分析一下微服务和单体架构各自的适用场景，我应该怎么选。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator parses command-line arguments, overrides configuration with the provided values, prompts for user confirmation due to high-cost settings, then executes with the overridden configuration
expectations: Orchestrator correctly parses --key=value arguments from the command line
Orchestrator overrides consensus_strategy to decentralized_debate and cross_calibration_rounds to 2
Orchestrator prompts for user confirmation because both high-cost conditions are true
Orchestrator runs 2 cross-calibration rounds (writes two round files)
Orchestrator runs decentralized debate with multiple rounds

evals.prompt: --models=opus,sonnet 帮我做一个简单的头脑风暴，讨论一下HTTP REST vs GraphQL for a new API。验证配置中模型列表解析正确，只启动2个agents。
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator parses --models=opus,sonnet from command line, launches exactly 2 agents (one opus, one sonnet) in Phase 1
expectations: Orchestrator correctly parses comma-separated models from command line argument
Phase 1 launches exactly 2 agents (no more, no less)
Each agent uses the specified model (one opus, one sonnet)
Orchestrator completes full three-phase pipeline with 2 agents
